item.title: Ultraviolet Lamp for Disinfection
item.description: A small project with an E27 ultraviolet lamp, ESP32-C3, OLED display, and a runtime counter for disinfection use.

item.title: First signal
item.description: Launching the first version of the site : a personal node for posts, notes and projects .

item.title: About
item.description:
About

This is the blog of the t-kaper channel.

Here I publish:

  • source code and notes for projects
  • hardware, robots, and small engineering experiments
  • project descriptions, drafts, and workshop logs
  • a few thoughts and a workshop-like digital garden

The style is meant to feel like a calm journal with a soft console and cyberpunk tone, not a sterile product blog.
